\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Provides methods for finite element operations in 3D. 

This class includes static methods for calculating gradients of basis functions and integrals for P1 triangles in 3D finite element analysis.

Reference Tetra4 element in \mbox{\hyperlink{namespaceArcane}{Arcane}} \begin{DoxyVerb}          3 o

          / | \
         /  |  \
        /   o 2 \
       / .    .  \
    0 o-----------o 1
\end{DoxyVerb}

Computes the X gradients of basis functions ūĚźć for ‚Ąô1 Tetrahedron. 

This method calculates gradient operator ‚ąā/‚ąāūĚĎ• of ūĚĎĀŠĶĘ for a given ‚Ąô1 cell with i = 1,..,4 for the four shape function ūĚĎĀŠĶĘ hence output is a vector of size 4 \begin{DoxyVerb}    ‚ąāūĚźć/‚ąāūĚĎ• = [ ‚ąāūĚĎĀ‚āĀ/‚ąāūĚĎ•  ‚ąāūĚĎĀ‚āā/‚ąāūĚĎ•  ‚ąāūĚĎĀ‚āÉ/‚ąāūĚĎ•  ‚ąāūĚĎĀ‚āĄ/‚ąāūĚĎ• ]

    ‚ąāūĚźć/‚ąāūĚĎ• = 1/(6ūĚĎČ) [ dx0  dx1  dx2  dx3 ]
\end{DoxyVerb}
 where\+: dx0 = (n1.\+y $\ast$ (n3.\+z -\/ n2.\+z) + n2.\+y $\ast$ (n1.\+z -\/ n3.\+z) + n3.\+y $\ast$ (n2.\+z -\/ n1.\+z)), dx1 = (n0.\+y $\ast$ (n2.\+z -\/ n3.\+z) + n2.\+y $\ast$ (n3.\+z -\/ n0.\+z) + n3.\+y $\ast$ (n0.\+z -\/ n2.\+z)), dx2 = (n0.\+y $\ast$ (n3.\+z -\/ n1.\+z) + n1.\+y $\ast$ (n0.\+z -\/ n3.\+z) + n3.\+y $\ast$ (n1.\+z -\/ n0.\+z)), dx3 = (n0.\+y $\ast$ (n1.\+z -\/ n2.\+z) + n1.\+y $\ast$ (n2.\+z -\/ n0.\+z) + n2.\+y $\ast$ (n0.\+z -\/ n1.\+z)).

This method calculates gradient operator ‚ąā/‚ąāūĚĎ¶ of ūĚĎĀŠĶĘ for a given ‚Ąô1 cell with i = 1,..,4 for the four shape functions ūĚĎĀŠĶĘ, hence the output is a vector of size 4. \begin{DoxyVerb}    ‚ąāūĚźć/‚ąāūĚĎ¶ = [ ‚ąāūĚĎĀ‚āĀ/‚ąāūĚĎ¶  ‚ąāūĚĎĀ‚āā/‚ąāūĚĎ¶  ‚ąāūĚĎĀ‚āÉ/‚ąāūĚĎ¶  ‚ąāūĚĎĀ‚āĄ/‚ąāūĚĎ¶ ]
